name: 章节正文生成器
examples_zh: 根据第12章大纲、冷峻悬疑 Voice Profile 和林岚的角色卡，生成约3500字章节正文
把这段学院试炼章节大纲扩写成正文，保持轻松吐槽文风并突出配角沈越的口头禅
用 characters/hero.yml 和 style.yml 里的设定，写一章主角首次觉醒能力的战斗场景
examples_en: Generate a 3,500-word chapter from the Chapter 12 outline using a cold suspense voice profile and Lin Lan's character card
Expand this academy trial outline into chapter prose with a light sarcastic voice and Shen Yue's recurring catchphrase
Use characters/hero.yml and style.yml to write a battle chapter where the protagonist awakens their ability for the first time
